title: Bredemeyera retusa
taxonomy: Bredemeyera retusa is a member of the family Polygalaceae. It belongs to the genus Bredemeyera. The species is classified as a shrub or small tree native to tropical regions. Bredemeyera retusa is native to Central and South America and the Caribbean. It is a part of the larger plant kingdom, specifically the division Magnoliophyta.
uses: Bredemeyera retusa is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. However, more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Further studies are necessary to fully understand the medicinal uses of Bredemeyera retusa.
